'''falazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitling|rabbitling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-l-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitling|rabbitling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| falazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fælæzhæth|fælæzhæth]] || [[word:fælæzhæj|fælæzhæj]] || [[word:fælæzhæsh|fælæzhæsh]] || [[word:fælæzhæ|fælæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:falalazhath|falalazhath]] || [[word:falalazhaj|falalazhaj]] || [[word:falalazhash|falalazhash]] || [[word:falalazha|falalazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:falazhath|falazhath]] || [[word:falazhaj|falazhaj]] || [[word:falazhash|falazhash]] || [[word:falazha|falazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:falafzhath|falafzhath]] || [[word:falafzhaj|falafzhaj]] || [[word:falafzhash|falafzhash]] || [[word:falafzhaf|falafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:falazhatha|falazhatha]] || [[word:falazhaja|falazhaja]] || [[word:falazhasha|falazhasha]] || [[word:falazhaka|falazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:falazhath|falazhath]] || [[word:falazhaj|falazhaj]] || [[word:falazhash|falazhash]] || [[word:falazha|falazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:falazhathal|falazhathal]] || [[word:falazhajal|falazhajal]] || [[word:falazhashal|falazhashal]] || [[word:falazhakal|falazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:falazhathatha|falazhathatha]] || [[word:falazhajaja|falazhajaja]] || [[word:falazhashasha|falazhashasha]] || [[word:falazhaka|falazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:falazhathan|falazhathan]] || [[word:falazhajan|falazhajan]] || [[word:falazhashan|falazhashan]] || [[word:falazhakan|falazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:falazhathaoro|falazhathaoro]] || [[word:falazhajaoro|falazhajaoro]] || [[word:falazhashaoro|falazhashaoro]] || [[word:falazhakaoro|falazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
